Description.English:
A powdery desert soil, slick with the gland expressions of a colossal sandworm. Historically, some have regarded this dust as the divine parent of such worms. It smells curiously sweet.

Cursed Dust gathers in the terrain deposits of planets blighted by titan worm activity.
Description.SimplifiedChinese:
一种粉末状的沙土，上面盖满了巨型沙虫留下的粘滑腺体分泌物。这种沙尘在过去曾被认为是巨型沙虫的神圣母体。闻上去有股不可思议的香甜气味。

在泰坦蠕虫活动的行星上能够找到包含诅咒之尘的地形矿床。
Description.TraditionalChinese:
呈粉塵狀的沙漠之土，被巨型沙蟲腺體排放物所沾染，而呈現油亮狀。在歷史上，有人把這種塵土視為孕育巨蟲的神聖母土，其味道聞起來異常香甜。

受詛咒塵土積聚於受泰坦巨蟲活動摧殘的星球地層之中。

PinObjectiveTip.English: Cursed Dust gathers in the terrain deposits of planets blighted by titan worm activity.
PinObjectiveTip.SimplifiedChinese: 从泰坦蠕虫出没的星球地形矿床收集到的诅咒之尘。
PinObjectiveTip.TraditionalChinese: 受詛咒塵土積聚於受泰坦巨蟲活動摧殘的星球地表資源產地中。

PinObjectiveMessage.English: Cursed Dust gathers in the terrain deposits of planets blighted by titan worm activity
PinObjectiveMessage.SimplifiedChinese: 从泰坦蠕虫出没的星球地形矿床收集到的诅咒之尘
PinObjectiveMessage.TraditionalChinese: 受詛咒塵土積聚於受泰坦巨蟲活動摧殘的星球地表資源產地中
